title: Investigate latest local procedure showing Announced and Claimed

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Root cause confirmed on latest task 77ef6ea9-427d-4799-a7b8-2d2f1becffeb for procedure 9a1c84e4-69d6-4718-b3ab-c95cc83dfc6d: persisted task metadata lacked dispatch_mode=local while dispatchStatus was ANNOUNCED and workerNodeId was set. Fixed runner invariants so local procedure task metadata is stamped local on every metadata write, local procedure tasks are not initialized as ANNOUNCED, and realtime task merges preserve existing metadata when sparse updates arrive.
